titleStmt.title: SII 29.9: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 9. (A.R. No. B. 542 of 1961-62.) BALLAṬGI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: It states that during the reign of Chālukya Jagadēkamalla, his queen Sōmaladēvi made a grant of 24 mattar land, a garden of one matter, 5 houses and one oil-mill to the basadi of Bhattagrāma-Baḷḷaniṭṭage when she was camping at Pandirkke. The village Bhattagrāma Baḷḷaniṭṭage is said to have been situated with in Eḍadoṟe-2000. The rod of measurement Piriyakōl also mentioned here.
The record is dated Śaka 951. Śukla, Pushya ba. 1, Wednesday uttarāyana sankrānti. It corresponds to 1029 A.D., December 24, Wednesday.
The slab is broken on top and right corner.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sa
para
śrī majjagadēkamalladēvara vijaya
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttami
kalyāṇābhyudaya sahasraphaḷabhōga bhāgini dvitīya lakṣmī
na kāmadēnu Āśrita janakalpalate śrī majjagadēkamalladēva pā
dapaṁkaja bhramariyarappa śrī matsōmaladēviyar pandirkkeya
ppaṭaṇada vīḍinōḷ sakavarṣa 951 neya śukla saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa
pāḍiva budhavāradanduttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiya parvvanimittaṁ yeḍadoṟeyi
rcchāsiradoḷagaṇa bhattagrāma baḷḷaniṭṭageya basadigeyalliya
kaṁmatadoḷage piriya kōlōḷ sarvvanamasya biṭṭa kariya nelaṁ ma
ttarippatta nālku tōṁṭa mattarondu maneyaydu ghāṇavondu . ślōka . na viṣaṁ
viṣa mityāhu dēvasvaṁ viṣamucyute viṣamēkākinaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ
putra pautrikaṁ . sva mēhatsukhaṁ duḥkha masyaṁ capāḷanaṁ
(dana)ṁ vāpōḷanaṁ vigihi (nārta)trayānṛpāḷanaṁ . Akarasukareya
su(taṁ) sahaśravaca spṛtā pravṛttakara(va)ṁ (ga)sugōkōṭiphaḷa(ma)
smati . sarvvēṣuye(ḍḍigra) bhū (kō) ṣṭhāna (dāsti) svayūrjjitaṁ . sunama
ṣṭa tarasyā (hū) dēvasyāpahāraka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō ha
rēti vasuṁdharā(ṁ) ṣaṣṭhivarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimi . vṛtta . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētu nṛpāṇāṁ kāḷekāḷe pā
ḷaniyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāgina pārtthivēndrā bhūyō
bhūyō yācate rāmacaṁdra .
Digital edition of SII 29.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
